V0901_01_00_00_0.text: As a proud Velgearian warrior, I never refuse a Duel!

V0901_01_00_01_0.text: I've come to Earth to save the Velgearian Star Cluster!

V0901_01_00_03_0.text: I will learn everything about Rush Duels so I can end a war!

V0901_01_00_04_0.text: I believe that this Duel will lead to a new road!

V0901_01_00_05_0.text: Warrior to warrior, let us have an honorable Duel!

V0901_01_00_06_0.text:
Yuhi!
I'm ready for today's  Rush Duel lesson!

V0901_01_00_07_0.text: Yuamu, please teach me everything you know about Rush Duels!

V0901_01_00_08_0.text: If it isn't my dear friend Chupataro!

V0901_01_00_10_0.text: You are a practitioner of the legendary Mean Mutt Style!

V0901_01_00_11_0.text:
Zuwijo!
This is one Duel I cannot afford to lose!

V0901_01_00_12_0.text:
Zuwijo!
This Duel will prove which of our ways is correct!

V0901_01_00_13_0.text:
Zuwijo!
Rush Duels must never be used for war!

V0901_01_00_14_0.text:
Hello!
It's wonderful to see you again!

V0901_03_00_00_0.text: I must increase my advantage in this Rush Duel!

V0901_03_00_01_0.text: My path lies beyond this battle!

V0901_03_00_02_0.text: I believe it's now my turn!

V0901_03_00_04_0.text: If I lose, my road will come to an end...

V0901_03_00_05_0.text: Never give up during a Rush Duel - no matter what the odds!

V0901_05_00_00_0.text:
Zaberi doo gilrai velgeard!
My path lies beyond this battle!

V0901_07_09_00_0.text: I'll use the card I Set!

V0901_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0901_16_00_01_0.text: With this attack, I will seize victory!

V0901_21_00_01_0.text: I will simply focus on winning this Duel!

V0901_21_00_05_0.text: Is there nothing more I can do?

V0901_28_00_01_0.text:
That was incredible!
I never knew what would happen next!

V0901_28_00_02_0.text: I am so glad my Velgearian road has led to Yuhi and Yuamu!

V0901_28_00_03_0.text: Rush Duels will bring peace to my home planet!

V0901_28_00_04_0.text: Since Yuhi taught me these moves, I am difficult to defeat!

V0901_28_00_05_0.text: My skills and abilities have greatly improved!

V0901_28_00_06_0.text: Thank you for such a wonderful Rush Duel!

V0901_28_00_07_0.text: A Rush Duel allows us to learn about each other.

V0901_28_00_08_0.text: My brethren, we have learned more about Rush Duels again!

V0901_28_00_09_0.text: I could not have made it this far without Yuhi and Yuamu!

V0901_28_00_10_0.text:
You're a great teacher.
That is why you are my dear friend!

V0901_28_00_11_0.text:
Zuwijo!
I came to Earth to end the war - not continue it!

V0901_28_00_12_0.text: Strife will only tear us apart - not unite us.

V0901_28_00_13_0.text: Whether your life is real or not, cherish every moment!

V0901_28_00_13_1.text: It doesn't matter how you were born - but how you live!

V0901_28_00_14_0.text: The whole time I've known you, you've never given up.

V0901_28_00_14_1.text: That is what I love and admire about you.

V0901_28_00_15_0.text: If you focus on the negative, you cannot create a positive.

V0901_28_00_15_1.text: Never forget that you also spread joy throughout the galaxy!

V0901_29_00_00_0.text: Please teach me everything you know about Rush Duels!

V0901_29_00_01_0.text: Rush Duels have such deep strategies!

V0901_29_00_02_0.text: Learning more about Rush Duels will help me end the war!

V0901_29_00_03_0.text: I must improve my skills because they're not good enough!

V0901_29_00_04_0.text: I must work harder to learn more about Rush Duels!

V0901_29_00_05_0.text: My knowledge of Rush Duels is still severely lacking...

V0901_29_00_06_0.text: I wonder why my dear friend Chupataro wanted to Duel me.

V0901_29_00_07_0.text: The Mean Mutt Style is truly a formidable technique.

V0901_29_00_08_0.text: I don't have the strength or skills to defeat Zuwijo yet.

V0901_29_00_09_0.text: I can't change Zuwijo's mind unless I become stronger.

V0901_33_00_00_0.text: There is something inside me telling me I must win!

V0901_33_00_01_0.text: This Rush Duel will help me take another giant step forward!

V0901_30_00_00_0.text: I know what I must do!

V0901_30_00_01_0.text: If that's not against the rules, I cannot complain!

V0901_30_00_02_0.text: I must read Rush Duel Digest to learn how to avoid damage.

V0901_34_00_00_0.text: My fellow Velgearians, what punishment should I deal?

V0901_34_00_01_0.text: How dare you cheat right before my eyes!

V0901_34_00_02_0.text:
A monster effect...
So that's how you Duel!

V0901_34_00_03_0.text: It'd be an honor if you would give me that powerful card.

V0901_34_00_05_0.text: I'm surprised a Rush Duel expert would make such a mistake!

V0901_34_00_06_0.text: It is a galactic rule to help those in need!

V0901_34_00_07_0.text: Oh no! I revealed my true form to this Earthling!

V0901_34_00_10_0.text: It takes courage to make the right decision.

V0901_34_00_11_0.text: Getting rid of a monster is not very kind!

V0901_34_00_14_0.text:
Planet Velgear is a wonder♪
Like Pyro, Aqua and also Thunder♪

V0901_34_00_15_0.text:
I made a poem to help me remember the Types.
You should too!

V0901_32_00_01_0.text:
To 8,880,000 of my brethren!
Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links will lead us to the truth!

V0901_35_00_01_0.text: I am Yudias, a proud warrior from the Velgearian Star Cluster!

V0901_36_00_00_0.text: You have my full trust that you will win this Duel!

V0901_36_00_02_0.text:
We switch places?
So this is how a Tag Duel works!

V0901_36_00_04_0.text: It's my lack of skills that have put us in this position.

V0901_36_00_05_0.text: Despite our current situation, I still believe we can win!

V0901_36_00_06_0.text: This Duel is for you to win, Yuhi!

V0901_36_00_07_0.text: I know you will make the right moves, Yuamu!

V0901_36_00_09_0.text: I know my dear friend Chupataro will not fail!

V0901_08_00_01_0.text: Long ago, a blade was forged from brilliant starlight!

V0901_08_00_01_1.text: I, Yudias Velgear, now offer this sword to my monster!

V0901_08_00_03_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Galactica Repulsion!

V0901_08_00_04_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Fuuuusionnnnn!

V0901_08_00_05_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Universal Storm!

V0901_08_00_06_0.text: I activate my Spell Card, Ancient Rules!

V0901_08_00_07_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Heavy Storm!

V0901_08_00_08_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Rightful Magic!

V0901_08_00_09_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Meteor Charge!

V0901_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Galactica Lattice!

V0901_08_00_11_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Lifeline Linac!

V0901_08_00_12_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Transam Alive!

V0901_08_00_13_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Transam Lightning!

V0901_08_00_14_0.text: I activate the Trap Card, Nebula Power!

V0901_08_00_15_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Nova Spark!

V0901_08_00_16_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Vacua Annihilation!

V0901_09_00_00_0.text: I activate Eternal Galactica Oblivion's effect!

V0901_09_00_01_0.text: I activate Transam Road Linac's effect!

V0901_09_00_02_0.text: I activate Transam Linac Overwrite's effect!

V0901_09_00_03_0.text: I activate Transam Variable Linac's effect!

V0901_09_00_04_0.text: I activate Galactica Supreme Oblivion's effect!

V0901_09_00_05_0.text: I activate Gray Storm Reverie's effect!

V0901_09_00_06_0.text: Almastro XI - Aquarius activates its effect!

V0901_09_00_07_0.text: I activate Vanishing Heliacal Riser's effect!

V0901_09_00_17_0.text:
Transam Linac - Fight for the Light!!
Activate your effect!

V0901_09_00_25_0.text: I activate Art Angel Metal Position's effect!

V0901_09_00_26_0.text: I activate Elite Agent Mystery's effect!

V0901_09_00_27_0.text: I activate Cat Claw Girl's effect!

V0901_09_00_28_0.text: I activate Sevens Road Magician's effect!

V0901_09_00_30_0.text: I activate Destructor Wyrm Bakhamut's effect!

V0901_09_00_31_0.text: I activate Kappa Emperor River Slider's effect!

V0901_09_00_32_0.text: Dian Keto the Cure Prodigy activates her effect!

V0901_37_00_00_0.text: The celestial stars converge into a beacon of destiny!

V0901_37_00_01_0.text:
Nothing'll break me!
Not blades, nightmares - not even fate!

V0901_37_00_01_1.text: Pave the path to the future of the galaxy!

V0901_37_00_02_0.text: Snow, ice, not even the freezing cold can block my way!

V0901_37_00_03_0.text: Wield the lightning to traverse beyond the speed of light!

V0901_37_00_04_0.text: Witness the sparkling comet that goes beyond the light!

V0901_37_00_05_0.text: When two lights merge, a brief spark will now last forever!

V0901_37_00_06_0.text: This swirling storm channels the heart of the galaxy!

V0901_13_00_07_0.text:
Unleash your strength!
Gray Storm Reverie!

V0901_13_00_08_0.text:
The judge of the nebulas!
Almastro XI - Aquarius!

V0901_37_00_07_0.text: No matter how long the night, the sun will always rise!

V0901_13_00_09_0.text: Break through the darkness to bring light to the galaxy!

V0901_37_00_08_0.text: Thoughts and memories converge to outshine all!

V0901_37_00_09_0.text: One hero leaves a trail of light to shine forever!

V0901_37_00_10_0.text: From the darkest abyss comes the will to exist!

V0901_13_00_13_0.text:
Absorb the truth of the universe!
Galactica Tabularasa!

V0901_37_00_11_0.text: Cleave the rivers of the galaxy with your sword of light!

V0901_13_00_26_0.text: Transam Linac - Fight for the Light!!

V0901_37_00_12_0.text: Pump up the bass for a monster that fights for the light!

V0901_37_00_13_0.text: Three hearts beat in unison to wish you a good night!

V0901_37_00_14_0.text:
Tracksuit of light...
Tracksuit of darkness!

V0901_37_00_14_1.text: The forces of opposite outerwear are sewn together!

V0901_37_00_15_0.text: Her squishy little paws can claw out the pure finish!

V0901_37_00_16_0.text: A wall, a mountain, not even a planet can block my way!

V0901_37_00_17_0.text: This ferocious feline is ready to play with its prey!

V0901_37_00_18_0.text: Forged fire and steel will blast you with its eye beams!

V0901_37_00_19_0.text: If a monkey can fall from a tree, a kappa can fail to swim.

V0901_37_00_19_1.text: So it must master machinery to keep them afloat!

V0901_37_00_20_0.text: Whenever she appears on screen, I say hello to the TV!

V0901_13_00_48_0.text: Hello, Dian Keto the Cure Prodigy!

V0901_37_00_21_0.text: One snowflake is delicate, but a blizzard can bury the dawn!

V0901_37_00_22_0.text:
Who’s cute as a button?♪
Miss Mutton!♪

V0901_37_00_22_1.text: Come and graze in my galaxy and fight for the light!

V0901_13_00_50_1.text: Princess of the Flock - Miss Mutton!

V0901_19_00_00_1.text:
Fight for the Light!
Good Night!

V0901_19_00_01_1.text:
Fight for the Light!
Illuminating Crash!

V0901_19_00_02_1.text:
Fight for the Light!
Finalizing Finish!

V0901_19_00_03_1.text:
Fight for the Light!
Pure Finish!

V0901_19_00_07_1.text:
Fight for the Light!
Crystal Collapse!

V0901_19_00_08_1.text:
Fight for the Light!
Crystal Cataclysm!

V0901_19_00_10_1.text:
Fight for the Light!
Saber Supernova!

V0901_19_00_11_1.text:
Fight for the Light!
Nebula Knockout!

V0901_19_00_14_1.text:
Fight for the Light!
Coiling Crush!

V0901_19_00_26_1.text:
Fight for the Light!
Pure Finish!

V0901_19_00_27_0.text: Go, Transam Linac - Fight for the Light!!

V0901_19_00_49_0.text: Attack, Dian Keto the Cure Prodigy!

V0901_19_00_49_1.text: There's no greater cure than fighting for the light!

V0901_19_00_50_0.text:
Blanc the Snowing Shadow Flower!
Attack!

V0901_19_00_51_0.text:
Princess of the Flock - Miss Mutton!
Attack!

V0901_27_00_00_0.text: I can't take much more of that...
